title: chrysanthemum burnatii
intro: Chrysanthemum burnatii, also known as the Dalmatian chrysanthemum, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Dinaric Alps in the Balkans. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum burnatii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. In herbal preparations, Chrysanthemum burnatii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties and is used to treat a variety of ailments.
